facebook.caption:
4.7 stars. 271 reviews. Vinpearl Phú Quốc keeps delivering.

Sitting on Bãi Dài, one of Phu Quoc's longest stretches of beach, this resort pulls consistent ratings for a reason. The kind of place where the photos actually match real life.

If you're building a Phu Quoc itinerary, this one belongs on the shortlist.
